series_metadata.series_description: In accordance with 4510.61 of the Ohio Revised Code, the licensing authority of a party state shall report each conviction of a person from another party state occuring within its jurisdiction to the licensing authority of the home state of the licensee. Each roport shall identify the section of the statute, code, or ordinance violated.
